The slgf package provides functionality to detect plausible
predictors in linear models. This exercise in cluster detecti
model. R packages already exist to fit finite mixture models
2009]. The flexmix package [Gruen and Leisch, 2023] in
regression data (including Gaussian, binomial, and Poisso
considers latent variables for the item response theory set
selection rather than fractional Bayes factors.

By contrast, slgf circumvents convergence issues by consider
model classes, obtaining integrated likelihoods and poste
overall probability of a cluster structure as the sum of all po
of total probability. The slgf package thus excels in smalle
structure is the core goal, and packages like flexmix will ex
models and conduct inference on parameters.
